title: Freefall
description: A client-only mod that allows you to deactivate your elytra mid-air on vanilla servers by simply pressing jump again
body:
# A very important quote
_WEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEE_ - R2D2, 22BBY

## Disclaimer
**This mod uses undocumented vanilla features and therefore might stop working or alert anticheat systems anytime!**

Tested on 1.21.7 Fabric in single player mode as well as on a 1.21.6 vanilla server using a 1.21.6 Fabric client.

## Functionality & Usage
This mod allows you to fold your elytra back up, therefore stopping gliding and starting to fall freely, by pressing the jump key again while airborne.
